decisions.question: How does tsuku self-update resolve and download the correct release asset (binary + checksum) for the current platform from GitHub releases?
How does the binary replacement sequence work end-to-end: temp file location, rename ordering, permission preservation, edge cases (tsuku outside $TSUKU_HOME/bin/), and backup lifecycle?
How does tsuku's own version get included in Feature 2's background check cache so that tsuku outdated and Feature 5 notifications can report self-update availability?
